title: Add a cron job to run tests and alert on failure via Discord

log.message: Created from Congress #69 verdict on: Should clungus add automated tests which run on a schedule?

Source verdict: Scheduled tests are the single cheapest insurance policy this system doesn't have. The heartbeat catches service failures after they happen; automated tests catch regressions before they ship. The cod...
Integration test timer running every 6h, Discord alert on failure
